description: The payment processor notifies the company of a chargeback filed by a customer. An agent needs to investigate and respond.

nodes.task_description: Receive the chargeback notification and identify the associated order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the order details related to the chargeback.

nodes.task_description: Gather evidence to dispute the chargeback, such as proof of delivery and communication history with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all relevant documents and logs.

nodes.task_description: Submit the evidence to the payment processor to fight the chargeback.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the dispute paperwork through the processor's portal.
